mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive forward returns exceed 55% when FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 60% of triggered instances or signal loses predictive power when UNRATE remains below 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates broad-based domestic demand strength, driving corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST yields negative forward returns in > 50% of cases, or interaction term IC falls below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth above its 12-month moving average confirms manufacturing sector resilience, supporting equity valuations through improved capacity utilization and positive 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO outperformance fails to predict positive returns when FEDFUNDS exceeds 5.0%, or rolling IC drops below 0.03 across all test periods.

mechanism_narrative: Steady monthly increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect sustained economic activity and consumer spending capacity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth exceeding 100k yields negative forward returns in > 55% of observations over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI increase exceeding 0.4% forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, causing immediate equity sell-offs and negative S&P 500 returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above 0.4% are followed by positive forward returns in > 60% of cases, or signal IC remains negative across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth combined with stable unemployment rates indicates a soft landing trajectory, boosting corporate profit expectations and driving positive S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The joint condition of rising GDPC1 and stable UNRATE produces negative forward returns in > 50% of instances, or interaction effect is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a liquidity contraction phase signals supply-side stress that outweighs demand factors, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during liquidity contractions yield positive forward returns in > 55% of cases, or the signal predictive accuracy vanishes when credit spreads widen.
